Because these are usually people with the highest purchasing power, they will buy within the platform, and these people also spend more time watching the videos.  In other words, it's an audience that TikTok considers to be of greater value.  And there's also the issue of where people are watching from.  For example, views from the United States are the highest paying.  If your video reaches countries like Mexico or Brazil, those views will pay slightly less.  And if the video spreads to countries like Venezuela and Colombia, countries that don't have TikTok's monetization program, those views, unfortunately, won't generate any revenue .  And then, to maximize RPM, we have the additional reward.  What is this?  The added reward is what we seek to maximize most these days.  In some videos, I manage to get an average of 10 to 20 times the bonus using the right strategies.  So if my base RPM is 50 cents or so, it can increase to 5, 10, you know?  What influences the bonus, and how do we maximize it?  primarily the retention of our video.  Quanto mais o público assistir o nosso vídeo, quanto mais perto do fim a galera chegar de ver o nosso vídeo, mais o TikTok vai considerar esse vídeo um bom conteúdo e você vai receber uma tag no teu vídeo de high watch time.  What does that mean ?  That's a high viewing time, and TikTok will pay you even more than usual.  And for that, we use specific scriptwriting techniques that I developed, as well as editing and quality control of your video.  If TikTok considers your video to be well- made and dynamic, it will pay you more.  E logicamente o vídeo precisa de uma qualidade alta, que é pelo menos 1080.
